Learn how to optimize your Astro site for better performance

Astro is a great choice for building fast websites. Here are some tips to maximize performance.

## Islands Architecture

Astro ships zero JavaScript by default. Only interactive components (islands) are hydrated with JavaScript.

```astro
---
// Static component - no JS sent to browser
import MyComponent from './MyComponent.astro';
---

<MyComponent />
```

## Code Splitting

Astro automatically splits your JavaScript into optimal chunks:
- Each island loads its own JavaScript
- Unused code is never sent to the browser
- Scripts are deferred by default

## Image Optimization

Use the Image component for automatic optimization:

```astro
---
import { Image } from 'astro:assets';
import myImage from '../assets/my-image.png';
---

<Image src={myImage} alt="My image" />
```

These simple strategies can significantly improve your site's performance!

An introduction to my new tech blog built with Astro

Welcome to my tech blog! This is the first post where I'll share my thoughts on software development, web technologies, and programming in general.

## What to Expect

I'll be writing about:
- Web development best practices
- New technologies and frameworks
- System design and architecture
- Performance optimization tips

## Why Astro?

I chose Astro for this blog because of its:
- Fast performance (Islands architecture)
- Excellent developer experience
- Flexible content handling with MDX
- Great theming capabilities

Looking forward to sharing knowledge with you!

A sample project to demonstrate the portfolio section

This is a sample project. You can update this with your own projects and achievements.

## Project Overview

This project demonstrates how to build modern web applications with:
- **Astro** for fast static site generation
- **TypeScript** for type safety
- **TailwindCSS** for styling

## Features

- Fast performance
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design
- SEO optimized

Feel free to customize this and add your own projects!
